use_cases: Full-viewport landing page hero sections for sustainability and clean energy brands
Marketing pages requiring social proof with user avatar stacks
Hero sections with gradient-overlaid background images and responsive text layouts
ai_summary: A full-viewport hero section featuring a background image with gradient overlay, bold typography, descriptive copy, and stacked user avatars for social proof. The component includes subtle hover animations on avatar elements with grayscale transitions. Designed for sustainability, clean energy, or mission-driven landing pages with a modern minimalist aesthetic.
